reason: features_catalog returned rich vol-family features. Key findings: 16 vol-related custom features exist including cf_rv_ratio_6_24 (realized vol ratio 6h/24h), cf_vol_regime_vov (vol-of-vol ratio), cf_vol_regime_transition, cf_vol_regime_switch, cf_vol_regime_compression, cf_atr_regime, iv_est/iv_est_1 (implied vol estimates). The hypothesis needs to validate whether these existing features satisfy the slice requirements or if new custom features are still needed.
summary: Discovered 16 vol-family features in catalog. Key matches to hypothesis: cf_rv_ratio_6_24 (realized-vol ratio short vs long window), cf_vol_regime_vov (vol-of-vol), cf_vol_regime_transition (vol expansion/contraction), iv_est_1 (implied vol proxy). Need to inspect their analytics and check overlap with baseline signals.

facts.vol_features_exist: cf_rv_ratio_6_24, cf_vol_regime_vov, cf_vol_regime_transition, cf_vol_regime_switch, cf_vol_regime_compression, cf_atr_regime, cf_vol_expansion_flag, cf_vol_imbalance_12, cf_vol_absorption_score, cf_vol_asymmetry_1h, cf_vol_price_div, cf_vol_squeeze_breakout, cf_vol_term_spread, cf_fwd_vol_regime, cf_mean_rev_pressure, cf_rv_percentile_48

pending_questions: Do cf_rv_ratio_6_24 and cf_vol_regime_vov have <30% overlap with baseline signal timestamps?
Does high vol-of-vol predict continuation or reversal in BTCUSDT?
Should we still build new custom features or are existing ones sufficient?
